settings.description: Battery, onboard computer and propulsion in one balanced, tool-less, clip-in kit. Choose your range — every pack shares the same pod, remote and case.
settings.footnote: Launches September 2026 · PowerPack delivery from December 2026.

settings.heading: What's in the kit
settings.intro: Everything you need to ride, in one case. The kit clips into the RIIFT Tracks your shaper builds into the board.

settings.title: PowerPack
settings.body: The battery and onboard computer — the brain and power source of the system. 2P, 3P or 4P.

settings.title: Propulsion Unit
settings.body: Motor, 49.5 mm pod, hub, blades and cable. Compact, efficient and low-drag.

settings.title: Remote
settings.body: Wireless throttle control, intuitive from the first ride.

settings.title: Charger
settings.body: Recharge your PowerPacks between sessions and stay on the water longer.

settings.title: Hard Case
settings.body: A protective travel and storage case sized for the full kit.

settings.heading: Full specifications
settings.footnote: *80 kg rider, flat water, continuous at ~20 km/h. Heavier riders and harder riding reduce run time; surfing roughly doubles it. †PowerPack + Propulsion Unit installed. ‡0–100% at 15 A, nominal. Prices AUD incl. GST.

settings.heading: A thinner pod cuts drag at every speed

settings.label: Pod diameter — vs a 63 mm industry standard.
Less drag than the industry-standard pod.
Up to, in 4P — power-to-weight at the top of the class.

settings.heading: How it compares
settings.body: RIIFT 4P against the comparable FoilDrive Fusion. Manufacturer-published figures.

settings.heading: Not sure which pack?
settings.body: Answer a few questions and we'll rank the right tracks and battery for how you ride.
